assertions.description: 239 components across main + 3 sub-sheets, power rails +3.3V/+5V/+5V_USB/GND/PWR_FLAG/VBAT all found, diode count (58 TVS + misc), crystal Q3 at 12MHz with 27pF load caps correctly identified.
differential_pairs contains D+/D- with shared_ics=['U6'] (USBLC6-2P6), has_esd=true. The USB ESD protection IC is correctly identified.

MICROSD SPI bus found with MISO net and chip select. PSRAM signals PSRAM_SIO1/SIO2/SIO3/PSRAM_SCLK/PSRAM_CE between U3 (ESP32) and U4 (APS6404L PSRAM) captured in multi_ic_nets. Memory interface U4 correctly linked to U3.
